LanguageData.VQE_CleanerDrone.label: cleaner drone
LanguageData.VQE_CleanerDrone.description: An automated utility drone. It continuously patrols an area, looking for dirty surfaces. Once filth is found, it will relentlessly clean the area with its internal scrubbing apparatus.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_CleanerDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
